title: begonia cavallyensis
intro: Begonia cavallyensis, also known as the Cavally begonia, is a species of flowering plant in the Begoniaceae family. It is native to West Africa and is often used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Begonia cavallyensis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a valuable resource for local communities in Africa who use it for various health concerns.
